description: Simple rolling-ball prop rig. Root stays in place while the body rotates for in-place sprite baking.

states._note: State names target the engine clip vocabulary (constants.ENGINE_CLIP_VOCAB) or resolve through constants.CLIP_SYNONYMS to a canonical clip -- no off-vocab orphan the renderer would silently play as idle (R-5). 'pop' was renamed to the canonical 'attack' (the ball's burst action); 'explode' to 'death' (the terminal effect). 'roll' is the ball's flavour locomotion kept under its own name (CLIP_SYNONYMS: roll->roll, NON-load-bearing -- the engine has no canonical roll clip). 'death' stays NON-load-bearing (not in ENGINE_CLIP_VOCAB; self-mapped in CLIP_SYNONYMS so it is not an orphan).
